summary: Phase 3 Polish & Advanced testing complete. React Router migration working correctly (URL-based routing). Topics Search and Scroll Reveal features implemented in code, CSS verified. All public route tests PASS. Authenticated features (Topics Search) require Google OAuth login which cannot be automated.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ React Router v7 properly integrated with BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, useNavigate, useLocation
✓ Route definitions in /app/frontend/src/router/AppRoutes.jsx correctly set up public and protected routes
✓ Protected route '/app/*' correctly redirects to '/login' for unauthenticated users
✓ Topics Search input implemented in HomeScreen.jsx with data-testid='topics-search-input'
✓ Clear search button implemented with data-testid='clear-search-btn'
✓ Search results count displayed with data-testid='search-results-count'
✓ Scroll Reveal animations CSS defined in index.css (.scroll-reveal, .scroll-reveal-left, etc.)
✓ ScrollReveal component implemented in /app/frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.js using IntersectionObserver
✓ Topic category cards wrapped with ScrollReveal component in HomeScreen.jsx
✓ 481 elements with CSS transitions found on landing page
✓ All JavaScript files lint successfully with no errors
✓ Landing page loads correctly with hero section, navigation, and topic cards visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 implementation verified: React Router migration complete, Topics Search and Scroll Reveal implemented. Note: Topics Search filtering requires authenticated user to test fully since HomeScreen is only shown after login. Google OAuth is required for authentication.

react_router_tests.landing_at_root: PASS - Landing page loads at '/' route
react_router_tests.cta_to_login: PASS - Hero CTA button navigates to '/login'
react_router_tests.protected_route_redirect: PASS - '/app' redirects to '/login' when not authenticated
react_router_tests.navigation_links: PASS - 'Life Topics' nav link scrolls to section without URL change

scroll_reveal_tests.css_styles_present: PASS - Scroll reveal CSS classes defined in stylesheets
scroll_reveal_tests.transition_elements: PASS - 481 elements with CSS transitions found

code_implementation_verification.scroll_reveal_hook: PASS - useScrollReveal hook implemented with IntersectionObserver
code_implementation_verification.scroll_reveal_component: PASS - ScrollReveal component wraps topic categories

notes: Topics Search feature is only visible in authenticated HomeScreen. Testing requires Google OAuth which cannot be automated. Code implementation verified through static analysis - all data-testids present, filter logic implemented correctly with useEffect on searchQuery state.
